title: rosa rubiginosa subvar. rubiginella
intro: Rosa rubiginosa subvar. rubiginella, a subspecies of the fragrant rose, is a flowering plant known for its fragrant, pink to purple flowers and edible hips. The plant is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, including its high concentration of vitamin C and flavonoids, which exhibit antioxidant and anti-inflammatory effects. The health benefits of Rosa rubiginosa subvar. rubiginella include its ability to support immune function, reduce inflammation, and act as an antioxidant, which may help protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. The plant is used in herbal preparations such as teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to support overall health and well-being, particularly during times of illness or stress.
